maps.Mirage: Balanced aim-duel map. High-precision sightlines favor AWPers and high-HS riflers.
maps.Inferno: Utility-heavy and narrow. High spray frequency. Lowers HS potential but boosts raw Kills.
maps.Nuke: CT-Sided verticality. Quick rotations. Favors tactical crosshair placement and high intensity.
maps.Ancient: Jungle-themed. High foliage. Favor aggressive entry pathing and high-KPR firepower.
maps.Anubis: Wide-open mid and fast rotations. T-Sided bias favors raw aggression.
maps.Dust 2: The aim-duel capital. Longest sightlines in the pool. Massive boost for AWPers.
maps.Overpass: Highly tactical. Long-range sightlines mixed with tight park chokes. High complexity.

team_styles.Team Spirit: Aggressive Entry/Methodical Support hybrid (donk/sh1ro). High-intensity academy system.
team_styles.Team Vitality: World Rank #1. Total tactical dominance. Built around the ropz/ZywOo duo. High-precision spacing.
team_styles.FaZe Clan: Tactical Individualistic. Relies on mid-round magic and individual clutch ability.
team_styles.NAVI: Disciplined Methodical System. Highly structured play with youth talent revitalizing firepower.
team_styles.G2 Esports: Aggressive Tactical Rebuild. sAw system focuses on SunPayus's patient AWPing.
team_styles.FURIA: Tactical Brazilian Aggression. Transitioned under FalleN to a veteran-led, calculated aggressive style.
team_styles.The MongolZ: High-Tempo Asian Aggression. Unique utility combinations and fearless trading.
team_styles.MOUZ: Mechanical Efficiency. Young, high-fragging roster (Jimpphat/Spinx) that excels on modern maps.
team_styles.Astralis: Structured Rebuild. HooXi-led tactical system focusing on trade-fragging and positioning.
team_styles.Team Liquid: Firepower Hybrid. siuhy European structure mixed with NA veteran experience.
team_styles.Team Falcons: Superstar Firepower Core. Led by NiKo and m0NESY. High-risk individualistic playstyle.
team_styles.Aurora: Turkish Aim-Heavy. MAJ3R system focuses on XANTARES/woxic explosive entry capabilities.
team_styles.PARIVISION: Jame-Style Defensive. Ultra-methodical with a heavy 'save-culture.' Very low-variance.
team_styles.Cloud9: Tier 2 Firepower Rebuild. Relies on raw rifling talent and high-variance aggression. Prone to mid-round collapses.
team_styles.Eternal Fire: Elite Aimers / High Pace. Turkish core with extremely high HS potential. Aggressive T-sides and chaotic map control.
team_styles.Complexity: NA Grit / Trade Focused. Strong site-entry execution. Relies on EliGE's veteran spacing and aggressive positioning.
team_styles.BIG: German Tactical Discipline. High utility efficiency but lower raw firepower. Predictable but very consistent defensive setups.
team_styles.HEROIC: Innovative Tactical Aggression. High frequency of stack-holds and creative utility. High intensity in close-quarters maps.
team_styles.GamerLegion: Tactical Underdogs. Excel at exploiting map-specific timings and utility gaps. Lower raw firepower but high strategic ceiling.
team_styles.Imperial: Aggressive Brazilian Momentum. Heavy focus on entry-fragging and emotional momentum. High variance between maps.
team_styles.9Pandas: Calculated Aggression. Strong CT-side holds and methodical utility usage. Rounds often go deep into the clock.
team_styles.Metizport: High-Tempo European 'Scout' Style. Hyper-aggressive entries and unpredictable rotations. High-risk, high-reward.
team_styles.Sashi: Fast-Paced Trading. Focuses on overwhelm-tactics and high-frequency duels. High intensity in regional qualifiers.

roles.Rifler: Primary engagement player. High volume of headshots and entry duels.
roles.AWPer: Sniper role. Focuses on center-of-mass kills. Naturally lower Headshot % but high survival.

tournaments.S-Tier (Major/Cologne): Maximum pressure. Teams strictly follow the tactical meta. Lowest volatility. High utility efficiency.
tournaments.A-Tier (Pro League/Online): High level play but slightly higher variance. Teams may experiment with new map setups.
tournaments.B-Tier (Regional/Qualifiers): High volatility. Chaotic playstyles. Individual hero-plays often override tactical structure.
